Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Crimson Vault]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — The Crimson Vault is another name for Ragnarus.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — The Crimson Vault is the source of the red stone used in King Zakareth's eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Crimson Vault is lit by unnatural scarlet torches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — The reign of the Crimson Vault is coming to an end according to the prophecy of the Rising Sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — The Crimson Vault is accessed via the Gate to the Crimson Vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — The appointment of Leah as Successor was sworn in the presence of the Crimson Vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Leah left the Crimson Vault and her father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — A Gate to the Crimson Vault can only be opened in the world, not in the Territories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — The Crimson Vault contains fragments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Talos opened a Gate to the Crimson Vault using red light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — The Crimson Vault resembles a huge cave with two red-burning torches and a silver door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The Crimson Vault has silver doors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The Crimson Vault has silver doors that were found cracked open.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 1''' — The Crimson Vault is a place the Eldest has not visited recently.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Zakareth left the Crimson Vault to find his palace in ruins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — The door to the Crimson Vault leads to Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — The power of the Crimson Vault is weaker in a foreign Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — The Crimson Vault is an old Territory that was forbidden by Elysia because it was too dangerous.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Crimson Vault is a location where the Lightning Spear was kept.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — The Crimson Vault may contain enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Chains of scarlet light burst out of the Crimson Vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — The Crimson Vault contains silver doors carved with the face of a one-eyed king.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — The Crimson Vault is a Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Indirial was pulled into the Crimson Vault by a band of ice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — There is much in the Crimson Vault that Indirial is not aware of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — Power from the Crimson Vault scattered the strength of Indirial's kick.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The Crimson Vault is a place Kai intends to tear apart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The Crimson Vault is a stretch of rock dyed red as though soaked in blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Leah walks through the Crimson Vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — The Crimson Vault contains rows of weapons on marble shelves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — The Crimson Vault is a location where blades can be sealed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — The Eldest mentioned the Crimson Vault in connection to a red stone.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
